hero.headline: Trusted multi-agent systems that can safely do real work
hero.subheadline: AEGIS AI Cooperative builds reliable, secure AI systems for businesses and community organizations—designed to stay under your control while proving real results.

grantServices.headline: Technical fulfillment for innovation grants
grantServices.subheadline: Don't just fund a concept—contract AEGIS to deploy working infrastructure.

services.title: Turnkey STEM Programs
services.description: We deploy sandbox-isolated educational AI platforms for your target demographic. You handle community interface; we handle the engineering, governance, and compliance.
features: Safe AI systems with built-in safeguards
Track every action for easy grant reporting
You control the pace—start supervised, expand as you're ready

services.title: Grant Impact Auditing
services.description: Our Trust Architecture provides granular impact logs for every dollar of grant funding. Prove exactly how AI was used, ensuring compliance with grant mandates.
features: Permanent record of all AI actions for accountability
Reports ready for grant compliance reviews

items.title: Built-in safety checks
items.description: Multiple systems verify each action before it happens, so mistakes are caught early. Your AI stays reliable and predictable.

items.title: Protected testing environment
items.description: AI works in a secure, isolated space where it can't accidentally affect your real systems. Think of it like a practice area where nothing can go wrong.

items.title: You stay in control
items.description: Start with close oversight, then gradually allow more independence as the AI proves itself. You decide the pace—never forced into full automation.

items.title: Complete transparency
items.description: See exactly what your AI is doing and why. Every decision is recorded and reviewable, making it easy to prove ROI to stakeholders.

cta.headline: Experience AI that respects you
cta.subheadline: No hype. No data resale. Just practical tools.
